title: MGN 601 (M) Amendment 1 MLC, 2006 crew accommodation for small vessels of less than 200GT
body: "This notice should be read with the Merchant Shipping (Maritime Labour Convention) (Minimum Requirements for Seafarers etc.) Regulations 2014 Part 7, MGN 600(M) amendment 3 which covers MLC inspections for Coded vessels and replaces MGN 601 (M).  Amendment 1 updates reference information only.  Notice to   vessel owners operators and managers seafarers designers builders and surveyors  "
